case_title: BAY AREA GRAPHICS AND PRINTING DBA BAY AREA ART VS PACIFIC FUNDING

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO ADEL ANBER/PACIFIC FUNDING RETURNED NOT SIGNED BY ADDRESSEE.
